name: Slay the Spire: The Board Game
description: Slay the Spire: The Board Game is the cooperative tabletop adaptation of MegaCrit's beloved roguelike deckbuilder — pick a character (Ironclad, Silent, Defect, Watcher), ascend a randomized spire of combat, elite, shop, and rest nodes, and add ever-nastier cards to your deck while the spire's curses and elites do the same. Card-driven combat, branching maps, brutal final bosses. Captures the original's cruelty with surprising fidelity.
